para_trans: (2) The above officers are temporarily promoted subject to the following conditions:
It is: -
(1) Ma. The Special Leave Petition No. of 28306/2017
Subject to all vacancies in the quota of promotion. 25/05/2004 is located
In respect of filling up of vacancies on a purely temporary basis, as per the conditions of service, S.P.V. / 16-B. of the Executive
The promotion is being given as per the instructions given in the Government Decision of D. 07/05/2021
It is, too. In the case of the Government Decision of 07/05/2021, Md. The High Court at Bombay
The promotion is subject to a challenge and a final decision on the same.
It's coming.
(2) Since the said promotion is of a purely temporary nature, this temporary promotion shall be deemed to be
As a result, any right to regularity and integrity of service to the officers on the rolls
You won't get it.
(3) The promotion shall be made subject to the approval of the Maharashtra Public Service Commission.
There are.
(4) The temporary promotion granted to such officers shall be for the purpose of making an order against them.
No departmental inquiry of any kind has been initiated or proposed as of date.
are being provided subject to assumption.
(5) If the aforesaid promoted officers do not accept temporary promotion, the Government may, in the ordinary course of time,
Department of Administration, No.SRV-2015 / Q.No.303 / Karyasana-12, D. 12/09/2016
Action will be taken as per law.
(6) From the date on which the aforesaid officers join the office of promotion.
They will be entitled to promotion benefits.
(7) The above officers appointed by promotion at their new place of appointment.
You have to get involved immediately. They must not go on leave unofficially or change positions.
Do not submit a request / application to do so. In doing so, it will be governed by the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules,
Violation of Rule 23 of 1979 shall be liable to disciplinary action.
They should take note.
(8) Director, Directorate of Vocational Education and Training, Maharashtra State, Mumbai.
Promoted officers to be relieved immediately and fresh appointments to be made.
Instructions should be given to be on the spot immediately. as well as the promotion of the officers concerned.
The compliance report of joining the office should be submitted to the government immediately.
This Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
